headline: Wells Fargo, Barclays Lift Target (TGT) Price Targets Following Improved Setup
summary: With a 5-year average dividend growth rate of 10.95%, Target Corporation (NYSE:TGT) is included among the 14 Best Dividend Stocks to Buy for Steady Growth. On May 12, Wells Fargo raised its price recommendation on Target Corporation (NYSE:TGT) to $140 from $135. It reiterated an Overweight rating on the shares. The firm said the setup around […]

headline: Amazon offering a new 30-minute delivery space
summary: Amazon (AMZN) is launching 30-minute deliveries throughout US cities as part of its Prime Now service, with plans to make this available in most areas 24 hours a day.  Yahoo Finance Tech Editor Dan Howley discusses this new service and what it means for the broader express delivery space, especially as more companies employ the use of delivery robots.
